blurb: Wild encounters and trainer teams for every location, in story order, from the Rigorous Red mastersheet. Tick wild Pokemon as caught and mark trainers beaten to track your run.

areas.name: Pallet Town
notes: count the fish/surf encounter as a separate location to your starter
the npc at the bottom left of oak’s lab gives you an old rod and 50 nuggets (to sell for basically infinite money), the pokeball near him gives the porta pc
The grass is only for pre statusing, you can't catch them

areas.name: Viridian City
notes: The sleeping guy now gives 5 White Herbs, these are the only White Herbs you get in the whole game so use them sparingly

areas.name: Route 22
notes: 1st rival battle here is unchanged

trainers.name: Professor Sada (To get the Old Amber) (PERMA SUN)
Team Rocket Ariana 1 (the grunt right before Fossil Nerd)

areas.name: Route 4
notes: count the Magikarp as a separate encounter to the grass/fish/surf encounter

areas.name: Cerulean City
notes: The move deleter and relearner can be located in the house to the left of the pokecenter
The npc that gives all the type boosting items can be found in that same house too
you can now find great balls in the Cerulean mart

areas.name: Route 24
notes: Blue gives you 10 Big Mushrooms which you can use to relearn moves, these are the only ones you’ll get in the entire game so use them sparingly

trainers.name: Team Rocket Proton 1 (the grunt at the end of Nugget Bridge)
Team Rocket Petrel 1 (the grunt that gives you Dig)

areas.name: Underground Path
notes: there is now a gift Hoppip here

areas.name: SS Anne
notes: If you want TM31 (BACK TO BACK):

trainers.name: Engineer Baily (AMBUSHES YOU AS SOON AS YOU ENTER THE GYM)
Biker Jaren (for TM44 Rest) (to the right of Aidan)

areas.name: Saffron City
notes: count the Hitmon as a separate encounter to the grass encounter

areas.name: Celadon City
notes: the game corner TMs have been changed to only require 50 coins each
you can now get Eevee in 1F of the Celadon Department Store, additionally, TM40, TM03, TM20 and TM34 can be found there too
the game corner encounter, the eevee gift and the fish/surf encounter all count as separate encounters
girl that gives TM16 and 33 has been removed

areas.name: Celadon Department Store
notes: Eevee is on 1F (counts as its own encounter). TM40, TM03, TM20 and TM34 can also be found here.

areas.name: Celadon Game Corner
notes: Prize Pokemon bought with coins (classic FireRed set): Abra (180), Clefairy (500), Dratini (2800), Scyther (5500), Porygon (9999). Pick one - it counts as a separate encounter.

areas.name: Rocket Hideout

trainers.name: Team Rocket Proton 2 (the guy guarding the button)
Team Rocket Grunt 12 (guy guarding lift key)
Team Rocket Ariana 2 (the grunt to the left outside Giovanni’s room)
Team Rocket Archer 1 (the grunt to the right outside Giovanni’s room)

notes: There is now a Gift Togepi on B1F (it’s an egg but just hatch it in Rocket Hideout), make sure to lead a mon with Max Friendship to get it

trainers.name: Channeler Emilia (her team might have the wrong natures in the calc)

areas.name: Route 16
notes: count the Snorlax as a separate encounter to the grass encounter
HM02 Fly is now in a Poke Ball left of the grass patch
Cooltrainers Verse and Connor (BACK TO BACK) (gives you access to leftovers, I’d recommend doing it right after Rocket Hideout)

areas.name: Route 17

trainers.name: Biker Virgil
notes: make sure you get fly before doing this gauntlet
IF YOU WANT TO GO LEFT, GAUNTLET
IF YOU WANT TO GO RIGHT, GAUNTLET

trainers.name: Beauty Olivia (one on the left, for TM42 Facade)
Bird Keeper Edwin (one on the right, for TM17 Protect)

rosters.title: Gauntlet
rosters.note: I’d recommend doing it right in E4 split

trainers.name: Picnicker Celia (has SetupFirstTurn AI so be careful of linoone and slaking)

areas.name: Fuchsia City
notes: count the fishing/surfing encounter separate to the fossil (Aero is E4 Split)
the fossil reviver can be found in the house directly left of the pokecenter

areas.name: Cerulean Cave
notes: you can access the first part of it after getting surf

trainers.name: Picnicker Irene (to get in from eastern Route 20)
Rocket Grunt 18 (jumps you as soon as you go to 2F)
Team Rocket Petrel 2 (the Rocket Grunt on 3F)
Rival Blue 5 (NO PERMA SAND FOR THIS FIGHT)
Rival Blue 5 (NO PERMA SAND FOR THIS FIGHT)
Rival Blue 5 (NO PERMA SAND FOR THIS FIGHT)
Team Rocket Archer 2 (the trainer right before Giovanni 2) (PERMA SAND)
Gym Leader Sabrina NOW GIVES TM36 INSTEAD OF TM04
PKMN Trainer May (fights you as soon as you enter the Mansion)

rosters.title: Gauntlet
rosters.note: GO TO THE TILE 2 TILES ABOVE CAVERN SO HE WILL MOVE OUT OF THE WAY, you must do these 2 fights without changing teams, leaving the area will cause Cavern to return to his original position, blocking you off from the Liechi

areas.name: Cinnabar Gym
notes: even if you answer correctly, you still have to fight the trainers
